name: filesize
description: JavaScript library to generate a human readable String describing the file size
author: Jason Mulligan <jason.mulligan@avoidwork.com>

scripts.build:analyze: npm run rollup && npm run analyze:size
scripts.analyze:size: echo 'Bundle size analysis:' && du -h dist/* && echo 'Gzipped sizes:' && gzip -c dist/filesize.min.js | wc -c | awk '{print $1" bytes (gzipped)"}' && gzip -c dist/filesize.umd.min.js | wc -c | awk '{print $1" bytes (umd gzipped)"}'
scripts.coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=dist/** --test-coverage-exclude=tests/** --test-reporter=spec tests/**/*.test.js 2>&1 | grep -A 1000 "start of coverage report" > coverage.txt
scripts.lint: npx oxlint *.js benchmarks src tests && npx oxfmt *.js benchmarks src tests/unit --check
scripts.fix: npx oxlint --fix *.js benchmarks src tests && npx oxfmt *.js benchmarks src tests/unit --write
